calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Settling Account And Report Of Trustee And Allowing Compensation To Trustee And Attorney
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Lee for Joseph Chennault (Trustee).

Mr. Lee addressed the Trustee's fees stating that this is the fourth Trustee of the Trust and that the Trustee spent a lot of time organizing papers. Mr. Lee also stated that he agrees with the Probate Examiner's recommendation of a $2,200.00 reduction in Attorney's fees. The Third Amended and Restated Petition for Order Settling Account and Report of Trustee and for Order Allowing Compensation to Trustee and Attorney was taken under submission. The Court informed Counsel that the Trustee will be compensated at the rate allowed for a Professional Fiduciary.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chien. Not reported.
